source_name: ABS Energy Account Australia — business / industry consumption

fields.scope_note: ABS Energy Account Australia reports business-sector final energy by ANZSIC division. Mining and manufacturing are typically the largest electricity-using sectors in PJ terms.
fields.primary_source_document: ABS Energy Account Australia (annual) — Tables 6 and 7 (final energy use by industry).
fields.keying_plan: Key annual electricity PJ per ANZSIC sector. Reconcile against DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics Table E (energy by industry) — methodology differs slightly.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual business / industry electricity consumption per ANZSIC sector from ABS Energy Account Australia. Mining is typically the largest single industrial electricity consumer in Australia.
citation: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Energy Account Australia (abs.gov.au).
